recommendations.title: Mom
recommendations.overview: After her stepdaughter is sexually assaulted at a party, a furious mother sets out to destroy the lives of the four perpetrators who walked free.

recommendations.title: Baaghi 3
recommendations.overview: A man embarks on a bloody rampage to save his kidnapped brother.

recommendations.title: Landmine Goes Click
recommendations.overview: After an American tourist steps on a landmine, he is forced to watch his girlfriend get assaulted.

recommendations.title: Savage Streets
recommendations.overview: Brenda, vivacious leader of the "Satins", a fun-loving group of pretty high school girls, searches for deadly vengeance against the gang members who assaulted her deaf-mute sister.

recommendations.title: Two of Us

recommendations.title: Junebug
recommendations.overview: On the way to meet with an independent artist in the South, newlywed art dealer Madeleine is convinced by her husband, George, that they should stop to meet his family in North Carolina. Madeleine's affluent lifestyle clashes with the family, but she

recommendations.title: Sleepers
recommendations.overview: Two gangsters seek revenge on the state jail worker who during their stay at a youth prison sexually abused them. A sensational court hearing takes place to charge him for the crimes.

recommendations.title: Grand Expectations

recommendations.title: Masculin Féminin

recommendations.title: Female Prisoner #701: Scorpion
recommendations.overview: After being cruelly set up and deceived by Sugimi, a detective in cahoots with the mob with whom she was whole-heartedly in love, Matsushima’s desire for revenge knows no bounds.
